components.name: Simple Snap-Fit Joints Library
components.description: Dimensioned cantilever and ring snap-fit generators with mating snap-hole helpers.

evidence.physical: Library-based clip printed successfully on Elegoo Centauri Carbon 2 with Elegoo PLA+.

components.name: BOSL2
components.description: Broad OpenSCAD mechanical library including joiners, hinges, sliders, clips, gears, fasteners, and threads.

components.name: MCAD
components.description: OpenSCAD mechanical components including gears, bearings, motors, nuts, bolts, and boxes.

components.name: NopSCADlib
components.description: OpenSCAD parts library and framework for assemblies, bills of materials, and fabrication outputs.

components.name: JointSCAD
components.description: Parametric OpenSCAD joinery for dovetail, finger, dowel, mortise-and-tenon, bridle, and scarf joints.

evidence.automated: JointSCAD dovetail coupon passes OpenSCAD, Trimesh solid/body checks, and ElegooSlicer without supports.
evidence.physical: Printed on Elegoo Centauri Carbon 2 in Elegoo PLA+ and evaluated fully cooled off the build plate. Per-side results: 0.15 mm cannot insert, 0.25 mm is a tight sliding fit, and 0.35 mm is slightly loose.

components.name: bd_warehouse
components.description: Collection of parametric build123d parts that can produce editable B-rep and mesh exports.

components.name: boltsparts
components.description: Parametric standards-based technical parts data and generators, successor to the archived BOLTS project.

components.name: FreeCAD Parts Library
components.description: Large collection of FreeCAD and STEP parts; use its index selectively instead of cloning the full repository.

components.name: PartCAD
components.description: Package manager and framework for reusable CAD parts, assemblies, requirements, and validation workflows.

components.name: Parametric Sliding-Lid Box
components.description: Support-free build123d enclosure with a full-footprint flat lid, concealed calibrated sliding tongue, separate assembly/print orientations, insertion path, and editable dimensions.

evidence.automated: SKADIS box composition passes B-rep, STEP round-trip, mesh, sampled lid insertion, and ElegooSlicer checks. The lid-specific process enforces face-down orientation, 220/60 C, a 5 mm brim, and no supports.
evidence.physical: Box body and T-clips printed successfully. The first recessed lid failed from a tongue-down perimeter overhang and warping; the flat face-down replacement is pending physical validation.

components.name: SKADIS T-Clip System - Painted Board
components.description: Separate printed twist-lock clip and embeddable STEP seat for mounting products to painted IKEA SKADIS boards.

evidence.automated: Source clip mesh is watertight and slices support-free; the seat STEP remains valid, fused, and through-open in the generated box.
evidence.physical: pending on local printer and board

components.name: Personalized SKADIS Micro-Cassette
components.description: Support-free wall cassette with a filament-pin knuckle hinge, removable rabbit clip, calibrated dovetail divider, embossed label, and community SKADIS T-clip seats.

source.attribution: agentic-3d-modeling project; BOSL2, JointSCAD, and Line Arc Line components

evidence.automated: All four production meshes pass solid/body and support-free ElegooSlicer checks; closed and 95-degree-open collision volumes remain below 0.01 mm3; estimated production time is below one hour at 0.28 mm.
evidence.preflight: Part 7 reproduces both production latch sockets and the BOSL2 double rabbit clip.

components.name: India-Austria Dovetail Friendship Cube
components.description: Two fully color-banded half-cubes joined by a concealed vertical dovetail that prints upright without supports or repeated color changes.

evidence.automated: Both upright production halves pass manifold/body and support-free ElegooSlicer checks. The assembly collision gate verifies the calibrated 16 x 8 mm dovetail with a 2 mm structural embed, and the 3MF gate verifies six full-volume color bands.
evidence.physical: The first cube's 0.05 mm rail overlap broke during bed removal. Revision 3 increases the rail to 16 x 8 mm and embeds it 2.0 mm into the India half; revised cube pending physical validation. JointSCAD sliding clearance remains validated at 0.25 mm per side.

components.name: Parametric SD Travel Wallet
components.description: Compact configurable tray-and-sleeve wallet with exposed card grips, support-free print orientations, and a releasable cantilever button latch.

evidence.automated: The five- and eight-card full-size SD trays, roof-down sleeves, and exact latch coupon pass manifold/body and support-free ElegooSlicer checks; both closed assembly collision volumes are 0 mm3.
evidence.physical: pending; print and evaluate the exact latch coupon before the production pair
